name: Frond
description: Three-bladed palm fronds planted across the canvas — the blades fan open and closed and lean with each redraw.

code.style: --lean: @rand(-12deg, 12deg); --rule: ( /* the side blades mirror one emitted spread angle and share the center blade's color */ --blade: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --spread: @r(16, 40); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 7%; height: 70%; margin: 15% 46.5%; border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--blade); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transform: rotate(var(--lean)); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--blade); transform: rotate(calc(@var(--spread) * 1deg)); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--blade); transform: rotate(calc(@var(--spread) * -1deg)); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transition: ease 700ms; } } transition: ease 700ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
